creator: koobs.freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Following up with the details and references included in an email to
yongari:

NetBSD Patch adding support for BCM57786 and serveral other broadcom
chipsets:

http://www.netbsd.org/~msaitoh/bge6-20130830.dif

NetBSD Commit (Sep 7 2013):

http://cvsweb.netbsd.org/bsdweb.cgi/src/sys/dev/pci/if_bgevar.h?rev=1.9.2.1&content-type=text/x-cvsweb-markup

Linux Commit for 57764, 57765, 57787, 57782 and 57786
device support:

http://permalink.gmane.org/gmane.linux.network/284331
